title: Incorrect results for OR query where both OR terms are different indexed expressions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t2(name, value) VALUES('Test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE upper(name) = 'TEST1' OR value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect transformation of OR query with indexed expressions
